title: Rocket Test Ends in Explosion

source.title: Breaking News: Blue Origin New Glenn rocket explodes during launch pad test

segments.title: A test goes wrong
segments.audioText: A Blue Origin rocket exploded during an engine test at a launch pad in Florida.
segments.transcript: A Blue Origin rocket exploded during an engine test at a launch pad in Florida.
segments.translationZh: 一支 Blue Origin 火箭喺佛羅里達一個發射台做引擎測試期間爆炸。

points.label: exploded during
points.explanationZh: 聽到 exploded during，意思係『喺某件事期間爆炸』，during 後面通常接活動或時間。

points.label: an engine test
points.explanationZh: engine test 係『引擎測試』；新聞會用簡短名詞組交代發生咩事。

points.label: at a launch pad
points.explanationZh: at a launch pad 指地點：喺發射台，而唔係已經升空。

segments.title: People are safe
segments.audioText: The company said all workers were safe, and no one was hurt in the blast.
segments.transcript: The company said all workers were safe, and no one was hurt in the blast.
segments.translationZh: 公司表示所有工作人員都安全，爆炸中冇人受傷。

points.label: The company said
points.explanationZh: 新聞常用 The company said 交代消息來源，聽到 said 就準備接官方說法。

points.label: all workers were safe
points.explanationZh: all workers were safe 係重點好消息：所有員工安全。

points.label: no one was hurt
points.explanationZh: no one was hurt 係自然新聞句，等於『冇人受傷』。

segments.title: The planned mission
segments.audioText: The rocket was being prepared to carry internet satellites into low Earth orbit next week.
segments.transcript: The rocket was being prepared to carry internet satellites into low Earth orbit next week.
segments.translationZh: 呢支火箭原本正準備下星期運送互聯網衛星去近地軌道。

points.label: was being prepared
points.explanationZh: was being prepared 表示『當時正被準備』，比 was prepared 更有進行中嘅感覺。

points.label: to carry internet satellites
points.explanationZh: to carry 說明目的：用嚟運送互聯網衛星。

points.label: low Earth orbit
points.explanationZh: low Earth orbit 係科技新聞常見詞，指離地球較近嘅軌道。

segments.title: What happens next
segments.audioText: Officials will investigate the cause, so future launches may be delayed for some time.
segments.transcript: Officials will investigate the cause, so future launches may be delayed for some time.
segments.translationZh: 官員會調查原因，所以未來嘅發射可能會延遲一段時間。

points.label: investigate the cause
points.explanationZh: investigate the cause 係『調查原因』，cause 呢度係名詞。

points.label: so future launches
points.explanationZh: so 連接結果；future launches 指之後嘅火箭發射。

points.label: may be delayed
points.explanationZh: may be delayed 表示『可能會延遲』，語氣保留，符合新聞未確認情況。

sentences: A Blue Origin rocket exploded during an engine test at a launch pad in Florida.
The company said all workers were safe, and no one was hurt in the blast.
The rocket was being prepared to carry internet satellites into low Earth orbit next week.
Officials will investigate the cause, so future launches may be delayed for some time.

vocabulary.example: The rocket stayed on the ground during the test.
vocabulary.translationZh: 火箭喺測試期間留喺地面。

vocabulary.example: The engine problem caused part of the rocket to explode.
vocabulary.translationZh: 引擎問題令火箭一部分爆炸。

vocabulary.example: Engine tests help teams check a rocket before launch.
vocabulary.translationZh: 引擎測試幫團隊喺發射前檢查火箭。

vocabulary.example: The launch may be delayed after the accident.
vocabulary.translationZh: 事故之後，發射可能會延遲。

vocabulary.example: The mission was planned to carry internet satellites.
vocabulary.translationZh: 任務原定運送互聯網衛星。

vocabulary.example: Officials will investigate what caused the blast.
A safety review can delay the next flight.
vocabulary.translationZh: 安全審查可能會延遲下一次飛行。

phrases.example: The problem happened during an engine test.
The blast looked serious, but no one was hurt.

phrases.meaningZh: 當時正被準備去做某事
phrases.example: The rocket was being prepared to carry satellites.
The next launch may be delayed.

speakingPractice.prompt: 跟讀第一句，特別留意 exploded during an engine test 嘅節奏。
speakingPractice.example: A Blue Origin rocket exploded during an engine test at a launch pad in Florida.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用 no one was hurt 改句，換入唔同事件。
speakingPractice.example: The fire was big, but no one was hurt.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用兩句英文講返新聞重點：發生咩事？有冇人受傷？
speakingPractice.example: A rocket exploded during a test. The company said all workers were safe.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用一句英文講你覺得點解測試前安全檢查重要。
speakingPractice.example: Safety tests are important because rockets are powerful machines.

dailyLifePractice.title: Quick coffee order
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺美國咖啡店落單，想自然咁改少少要求。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, can I get a medium iced latte with oat milk? Actually, could you make that less sweet? That's all, thanks.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, can I get a medium iced latte with oat milk?
lines.zh: 你好，我想要一杯 medium iced latte，轉 oat milk。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Actually, could you make that less sweet?

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Can I get... 比 I want... 自然同禮貌。Actually, could you... 係即場改口時好常用。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 drink、size、milk 換成你真係會買嘅版本。
drills.example: Can I get a small cold brew with no sugar?

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 你做 customer 講一次，再做 barista 回一句 Anything else?

dailyLifePractice.title: Small talk after a delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你遲咗少少到，同 coworker 簡短交代原因。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Sorry I'm a few minutes late. Traffic was worse than usual. Thanks for waiting.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Sorry I'm a few minutes late.
lines.zh: 唔好意思，我遲咗幾分鐘。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: No worries. We just got started.
lines.zh: 冇問題，我哋都係啱啱開始。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: a few minutes late 聽落比 very late 輕。No worries 係美國日常常見回應，語氣自然。

drills.label: Swap reason
drills.prompt: 將 Traffic was worse than usual 換成另一個真實原因。

drills.label: Polite close
drills.prompt: 用 Thanks for waiting 或 Thanks for being flexible 收尾。

notes: 聽科技新聞時，先抓住事件動詞：exploded, said, prepared, investigate。
遇到長名詞組，例如 internet satellites into low Earth orbit，可以分成 internet satellites / into low Earth orbit 兩段聽。
may be delayed 係新聞常用保留語氣，表示可能發生，但未百分百確定。
跟讀時唔需要逐字用力，先模仿句子重音：rocket, exploded, engine test, no one, delayed。
